title: Subitem Activity
excerpt: Hello Monday Community! I have a quick question about the activity log. I am gathering data about the date columns in our subitems and tracking how many meeting needed to be rescheduled, but the activity log does not inc…

posts.author: mammamia (mia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello Monday Community! I have a quick question about the activity log. I am gathering data about the date columns in our subitems and tracking how many meeting needed to be rescheduled, but the activity log does not include subitems. Is there a filter I’m missing, or another way to see subitem activity?

posts.author: timlittletech (Tim Little)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @mammamia each subitem has its own activity log. (right next to the updates section for the subitem) Unfortunately I think that may be a pain for you to go through and click each subitem and its activity.

If you are looking to do this excercise in the future I would recommend setting an automation an item in a separate board to ‘log’ each time a date changes on the subitem. should be a quick custom automation that will give you that data in future.

Screen Shot 2021-09-29 at 9.05.24 AM1256×542 14.3 KB

Hope that helps!
Best!

posts.author: mammamia (mia)
posts.cookedHtml: This was incredibly helpful! Thank you @timlittletech!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
